finalized_plan.description: Use search_agent to find out which dinosaur article is the only one on English Wikipedia that has reached Featured Article status, ensuring that the search query includes a reference to dinosaur featured articles and the promotion date of November 2016
Verify that this article’s promotion indeed occurred in November 2016 by checking its revision history or related project pages
Identify and locate the nomination record or discussion page where this dinosaur article was formally nominated for Featured Article status
Extract from that nomination record the identity (username or full name) of the person who made the nomination
Cross-check the nomination details with additional Wikipedia project documentation or logs to ensure accuracy
Provide the final answer with the precise nominator’s name

root_cause_reasoning: The agent failed to envoke the search_agent
